title: vote.superseded event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.10. Produced by epd2_voting_service.events.build_vote_superseded_event: vote_envelope_state_payload(envelope) plus superseded_by (the vote_envelope_id of the new envelope that superseded this one, ADR-009 items 1-2's vote-change/latest-valid-vote rule). additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing vote-linkability control (CT-00-09): account_id, person_id, identity_record_id, full_name, email, membership_id, and identity_provider_reference are all forbidden and cannot appear on a payload that validates against this schema.
